subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of God! Thy letter was perused. Thou hadst written that 'I am striving to cause the friends of Spokane
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی نامه ات ملاحظه گردید … وجود بر دو قسم است یکی وجود حق که مقدس از ادراک خلق است
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @station of the Manifestation of God, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
